title: Hippo Keystrokes
description: A forge mod that display keystrokes and CPS.
body:
Hippo keystrokes mod is an addons for modern minecraft version that can display your CPS, and track your keystrokes insanely fast. (images below)

Disclaimer: This mod is ONLY on curseforge and modrinth. I'm not responsible of what happens on other platforms Discord support server of the mod: https://discord.gg/S7mTtZxJZh

Features:

Dynamic Keystrokes: Watch your W, A, S, D, and Spacebar keys light up as you press them.

CPS tracker: Know accurately what is your current right/left CPS.

FPS Display: You can see your fps anytime.

Custom Command: Control the display with a simple command.

How to Use:

To toggle the KeystrokesHippo overlay on or off, simply type the following command in the chat: Version 1.0: /hippoKeystrokes_toggle
Version2.0: /hippoKeystrokes_toggle_gui
Version 3.0+:
Go to minecraft settings/options, and there you can set the position of the keystrokes, and disable/enable everything. (look picture below)

Version suppport & Feature request:

You can do a comment here or join the discord server, if you want me to add a feature or a specific minecraft version. Feel free to contribute: https://github.com/pseudonym-2669/Minecraft-HippoKeystrokes (MIT licence)
